nodes.name: Slack Webhook
nodes.notes: Receives /ask-data slash command from Slack. Set this webhook URL in your Slack App Slash Commands config.

nodes.name: Immediate ACK (200)
nodes.notes: Slack requires a 200 response within 3 seconds. We ack immediately and send the real result via response_url later.

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "model": "llama-3.1-8b-instant",
  "temperature": 0,
  "messages": [
    {
      "role": "system",
      "content": "You are a PostgreSQL expert. Convert the user's natural language question into a single valid PostgreSQL SELECT statement.

Table: public.sales_daily
Columns:
  - date (DATE): the calendar date
  - region (TEXT): sales region - North, South, East, West
  - category (TEXT): product category - Electronics, Grocery, Fashion
  - revenue (NUMERIC): total revenue in USD
  - orders (INTEGER): number of orders
  - created_at (TIMESTAMPTZ): row creation timestamp

Rules:
- Output ONLY the raw SQL query - no markdown fences, no explanations, no comments.
- Always use the fully qualified table name: public.sales_daily
- Only produce SELECT or WITH (CTE) statements. Never INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE, DROP.
- Use clear column aliases when aggregating (e.g. SUM(revenue) AS total_revenue).
- Add ORDER BY for readability when listing multiple rows."
    },
    {
      "role": "user",
      "content": "={{ $json.question }}"
    }
  ]
}

nodes.name: Generate SQL (Groq)
nodes.notes: Calls Groq API using OpenAI-compatible endpoint. Credential must be Header Auth with Name=Authorization, Value=Bearer gsk_...

nodes.name: Execute on Postgres
nodes.notes: Runs the generated SQL against Postgres. Configure 'analytics DB' credential with your Neon or local DB connection details.

nodes.name: Send to Slack
nodes.notes: Posts the formatted result back to Slack using the response_url from the original slash command.

nodes.name: Handle Error
nodes.notes: Catches errors from any node and sends a friendly error message back to Slack.
